title: Fifa World Cup Celebrity National Team Poster AI
sourceTitle: Fifa World Cup Celebrity National Team Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: FIFA World Cup 2026 celebrity national team poster for famous pop star with confident editorial presence, wearing official South Korea national football team jersey with realistic fabric texture and team crest. Subject: famous pop star with confident editorial presence is centered in an ultra-realistic studio portrait, looking confidently at camera with premium fashion styling, realistic facial detail, sharp eyes, natural skin texture, and cinematic composure. Scene: Clean editorial sports campaign set with colored smoke and atmospheric fog in FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 – CELEBRITY NATIONAL TEAM POSTER Ultra-realistic studio portrait of a famous pop star wearing an official national football team jersey, centered composition, clean editorial sports campaign, a large bold white 26 behind the subject, FIFA logo at the top center, and SOUTH KOREA displayed at the bottom. Composition: Fixed symmetrical vertical poster layout: centered portrait, giant 26 typography integrated into the background, top FIFA logo, bottom national team name, clean negative space, and premium campaign hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved fifa world cup celebrity national team poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Smoke Colors: red, white, and blue smoke. Style: Modern FIFA promotional poster with minimalist graphic design, Nike/Adidas campaign quality, luxury magazine cover finish, hyper-realistic portrait photography, detailed jersey fabric, team crest and sportswear branding. Color Palette: FIFA WORLD CUP 2026 – CELEBRITY NATIONAL TEAM POSTER Ultra-realistic studio portrait of a famous pop star wearing an official national football team jersey, centered composition, clean editorial sports campaign drives the national color atmosphere while white 26 typography, realistic jersey fabric, and premium editorial neutrals keep the layout clean. Lighting: Cinematic studio lighting, soft shadows, subtle jersey highlights, atmospheric smoke glow, and clear facial detail. Typography: Large white 26 fills the background; FIFA logo stays top center; SOUTH KOREA appears in elegant spaced typography at the bottom. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
